name: 預言災難鉤子
description: 女主預言丈夫今天會有血光之災，丈夫不信並立下賭約，觀眾立刻進入倒計時緊張感，等待預言是否成真。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Wrong Wong. I did the math. Today is not a good day for divorce. If you get divorced today, you're definitely going to have a bloody accident... If I have a bloody accident today, not only will I not divorce you, I'll even wash my hair upside down for you to see.
